data.content: Deployment issue: implementation changes are uncommitted in the working directory. git diff shows 4 modified files (src/app/beats/page.tsx, src/app/beats/use-beat-actions.ts, src/components/filter-bar.tsx, src/components/beat-table-mutations.tsx) and 2 untracked test files (use-beat-actions-refine-scope.test.ts, bulk-refine-scope.test.ts). No commit was made to main. Shipment step must commit and push these changes before shipment review can proceed.
